---
title: "Schedule"
---

## 2027/28 timetable

The teaching timetable for TRAN5340M in 2027/28 is currently **[TBC]**.

Please use the official University timetable once published and check back here for an updated session-by-session schedule.

## Provisional structure

Based on the approved module catalogue entry, the module is delivered through:

- 6 lectures
- 6 practical sessions
- 2 seminars

Exact dates, times, rooms, and deadlines are **[TBC]**.
